allow: Bash(node -e "const SpotifyWebApi = require\(''spotify-web-api-node''\); const api = new SpotifyWebApi\(\); const methods = Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(SpotifyWebApi.prototype\).filter\(m => /play|pause|skip|queue|device|volume|seek|repeat|shuffle|current/i.test\(m\)\); console.log\(methods.join\(''\\n''\)\);")
